data.title: Distributed Microservices
data.description: YouTube uses a microservices architecture to separate functionalities into independent modules.
data.technical_spec: A variety of services communicate over network protocols, often using RESTful APIs.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN) Integration
data.description: CDNs are used to distribute content efficiently and reduce latency.
data.technical_spec: Multiple regional data centers handle the video streaming traffic.

data.title: Apache Kafka for Data Streaming
data.description: Real-time data streaming for various analytics and recommendation engines.
data.technical_spec: Uses Apache Kafka to manage real-time data pipelines and streaming applications.

data.title: SQL and NoSQL Databases
data.description: Combination of relational and non-relational databases to handle different data types and volumes.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes databases such as Bigtable (NoSQL) and MySQL (SQL).

data.title: Global Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures equitable distribution of incoming network traffic.
data.technical_spec: Cloud-based load balancers distribute web traffic and adjust workloads dynamically.
